home.title: Minesweeper Rogue
home.subtitle: Numbers show the total strength of nearby monsters. Your HP is a resource — spend it wisely, reach the dragon.

intro.dailyGoal: One dense floor, same board for everyone today. Reach the 🪜 stairs alive — one attempt per day.

guard.name: Leather Guard
guard.desc: The first hit you take each run does 1 less damage.

learner.name: Quick Learner
learner.desc: Each level-up needs 1 less XP per level.

revive.name: Last Candle
revive.desc: Once per run: survive a killing blow at half HP.

tough.name: Iron Heart
tough.desc: +2 max HP, right now and for the rest of the run.

weaken.name: Dull Blades
weaken.desc: All monsters lose 1 strength (numbers update too).

scout.name: Spyglass
scout.desc: Each floor starts with an extra area revealed.

vamp.name: Blood Fang
vamp.desc: Killing a monster of strength 3+ heals 1 HP.

tut.s1: Welcome to the dungeon. Tap the glowing dark tile to reveal it.
tut.s2: Numbers show the TOTAL strength of monsters in the 8 tiles around them (👻 ghosts don't count).
tut.s3: HP is a resource: step on the highlighted weak monster. You lose a little HP but gain XP and gold.
tut.s4: Leveling up fully heals you. Find the 🪜 stairs and click them to descend. Slay the dragon!
